---
name: Classic sheet bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: 'Veritas1000'

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**Debug information**
Please turn on the classic sheet debug panel under **Settings** > **Classic View** > **Debug classic sheet** and make sure it is in either the provided pdf or screenshots.

**Screenshots or PDF**
If applicable, add screenshots or the generated pdf to help explain your problem.

**Data file**
Please include the exported data file (Hero, Encounter, etc) that is causing the issue

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
